Title: WSDL_IMPORT_UDT
Description: Returns a string containing a UDT definition

This function is used to create a user defined type (UDT) definition
    automatically based on a WSDL file. The source WSDL is supplied via a URL.

The returned definition can be saved to a file and/or executed automatically
    to provide instant access to the new UDT.
To save the file you must have an appropriate ACL defined.
Examples:
SQL> redcoaltest();
res
NVARCHAR
5.0
1 Rows. -- 1974 msec.
